title: Supernatural Willpower
wikitext:
[[File:aiolos determined.png|thumb|300px|[[Sagittarius Aiolos|Aiolos]] has a will strong enough to take Athena where he wants even when unconscious.]]

==Summary==
'''Supernatural Willpower''' is the ability to exceed one's own limits through sheer willpower to a degree extremely far beyond real human standards. 

Although some characters can be considered to have a great will to achieve their goals or give their all in a fight, characters that have a willpower on this level can go vastly beyond what should logically be possible for them, with more extreme cases being able to oppose natural phenomena such as death.

Characters with this ability may be able to [[Resistance|resist]] enormous amounts of [[Pain Manipulation|pain]], act even when [[Instinctive Reaction|unconscious]] or well beyond what they should be able to endure, resist [[Possession|possession]] and [[Mind Manipulation|mind control]], affect their environment, or even go against natural phenomena, such as death or the [[Law Manipulation|limits]] imposed by reality.

==Users==
*[[Green Lantern (Hal Jordan)|Hal Jordan]], [[Green Lantern (Alan Scott) (Post-Crisis)|Alan Scott]], [[Green Lantern (John Stewart) (Post-Crisis)|John Stewart]], and other Green Lanterns ([[DC Comics]])
*[[Simon the Digger]] ([[Gurren Lagann (Verse)|Gurren Lagann]])
*[[Ryūko Matoi]] and [[Satsuki Kiryūin]] ([[Kill la Kill]])
*[[Pantheon]] ([[League of Legends]])
*[[Roronoa Zoro (Pre-Timeskip)|Roronoa Zoro]] ([[One Piece]])
*[[Frisk]] ([[Undertale]])
'''Note:''' This ability should only be given to characters that have explicitly displayed far beyond human levels of mental endurance. This may have been demonstrated in the form of a highly reliable statement or a significant event. An example of the latter would be Roronoa Zoro taking in all of Monkey D. Luffy's pain at once.
